Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-09 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's rankings with a score of 93.8 and rank #1, displaying exceptional long-term momentum across all timeframes—notably a 1,522% return over 10 years and 520% over 5 years, far outpacing SPY by 1,291 percentage points over the same decade. The stock's momentum is reinforced by clean technical structure with all four major moving averages (SMA30/50/100/200) in bullish alignment, a "strong_buy" flag, and consistent acceleration across time periods (3-month ratio of 5.67x vs 1-month returns). CF ranks second with a 65.71% 1-year return and 4 of 4 ratio passes, but shows cracks: it failed to clear the SMA30, returned only 50% more than SPY over 10 years (versus LINC's massive outperformance), and experienced a 6-month pullback (0.55 ratio) that disrupted its otherwise positive momentum trajectory. The data reveals a stark performance divergence where LINC represents a rare sustained secular uptrend across multiple decades, while CF demonstrates more cyclical strength with lagging long-term relative performance.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
